subject: URGENT: Project deadline changed
body: The project deadline has been moved to next Friday. This is critical. Please prioritize this task above all others.

subject: Weekend plans
body: Hey! Want to grab coffee this weekend? I miss catching up with you.

subject: You won!
body: Congratulations! You've won a prize! Click here to claim.

subject: Standup meeting at 10 AM
body: Our daily standup is at 10 AM today. Please be on time.

subject: Security alert: Unusual login detected
body: We detected an unusual login attempt on your account. Please verify if this was you and reset your password if needed.

subject: Family dinner Sunday
body: Can you make it to family dinner on Sunday at 6 PM?

subject: Benefits enrollment deadline Friday
body: Benefits enrollment closes on Friday. Please complete your enrollment in the portal.

subject: URGENT: Verify your account NOW
body: Click here immediately to verify your account! This is urgent!

subject: New architecture proposal
body: I want to discuss the new system architecture proposal. This requires immediate attention and could impact our roadmap.

subject: Weekly newsletter
body: Check out this week's best articles and news in tech.

subject: Project feedback - Changes needed
body: We've reviewed the deliverables and have some changes we need made. Can you schedule a call to discuss?

subject: LIMITED TIME OFFER: 70% OFF
body: DON'T MISS OUT! Get 70% off everything! Use code: SPAM70. LIMITED STOCK!

subject: Quick favor
body: Hey, could you quickly review the document I sent? Just need your feedback on the approach.

subject: Verify your identity - Action required
body: URGENT: Verify your identity by clicking here. Your account is at risk!

subject: Let's chat soon
body: Haven't heard from you in a while. Let's schedule a call soon!

subject: Expense reimbursement approved
body: Your recent expense reimbursement of $500 has been approved and will be processed.

subject: Your order has shipped!
body: Your order #12345 has shipped! Track your package here: [link]

subject: Q1 planning session - Your attendance required
body: We're having a Q1 planning session next Monday. Your attendance is required. This is a strategic meeting.

subject: Earn money from home!
body: Make $5000/month working from home! Click here to get started! No experience needed!

subject: Support ticket #789 - Your issue resolved
body: The support ticket you submitted has been resolved. Please verify the fix works for you.
